commit.subject: LU-0000 tests: run ior
commit.message:
LU-0000 tests: run ior

to reproduce LU-18416

Test-Parameters: fortestonly clientcount=4 env=ONLY="iorfpp",ior_blockSize=128,ior_type=MPIIO testlist=parallel-scale
Test-Parameters: fortestonly clientcount=1 env=ONLY="iorfpp",ior_blockSize=128,ior_type=MPIIO testlist=parallel-scale
Signed-off-by: Alex Zhuravlev <bzzz@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I4555236f08ace401a7f4db4771f7bd41f332a297
